name: memory-recall
description: Multi-dimension recall + auto-save. Recall: memory, skills, tools, agent types with reminder/agentic/embedding backends. Auto-save: Stop hook analyzes each turn and persists valuable knowledge via Haiku CRUD.

tools.title: Tools Recall Backend
tools.description: 'off', 'reminder' (list all), 'agentic' (Haiku selects), or 'embedding' (vector match). Covers MCP servers + deferred tools.

memory_input.title: Memory Input Granularity
memory_input.description: What Haiku sees: 'title_desc' (name+description) or 'full' (entire file content)

memory_output.title: Memory Output Granularity
memory_output.description: What gets injected to main model: 'title_desc' or 'full' (entire file content)

skills_input.title: Skills Input Granularity
skills_input.description: What Haiku sees: 'title_desc' (name+description) or 'full' (SKILL.md content, truncated)

skills_output.title: Skills Output Granularity
skills_output.description: What gets injected: 'title_desc' (name+reason) or 'full' (skill SKILL.md content)

tools_input.title: Tools Input Granularity
tools_input.description: What Haiku sees: 'title_desc' (name+description) or 'full' (full tool description)

agents_input.title: Agents Input Granularity
agents_input.description: What Haiku sees: 'title_desc' (name+description) or 'full' (agent markdown content, truncated)

agents_output.title: Agents Output Granularity
agents_output.description: What gets injected: 'title_desc' (name+reason) or 'full' (agent markdown content)

agentic_mode.title: Agentic Mode
agentic_mode.description: 'parallel' (one Haiku call per dimension, better quality) or 'merged' (single call for all dimensions, faster ~5s vs ~20s)

context_messages.title: Context Messages
context_messages.description: Number of recent conversation messages to include for search context

context_max_chars.title: Context Max Chars
context_max_chars.description: Maximum characters of conversation context to send

embedding_model.title: Embedding Model
embedding_model.description: HuggingFace model name for embedding backend

embedding_python.title: Embedding Python Path
embedding_python.description: Path to Python with sentence-transformers installed

embedding_threshold.title: Embedding Threshold
embedding_threshold.description: Cosine similarity threshold; below this falls back to reminder

embedding_top_k.title: Embedding Top K
embedding_top_k.description: Maximum number of results to return per dimension

max_content_chars.title: Max Content Chars
max_content_chars.description: Maximum total characters of injected memory content

memory_save_enabled.title: Memory Save Enabled
memory_save_enabled.description: Enable automatic memory saving after each assistant turn (Stop hook). Haiku analyzes conversations and persists valuable knowledge.

recall_effort.title: Recall Effort
recall_effort.description: Effort level for recall agentic calls: 'low' (faster/cheaper) or '' (default). Low works for simple schemas.

memory_save_effort.title: Memory Save Effort
memory_save_effort.description: Effort level for memory save calls: '' (default, required for complex structured output) or 'low'. Note: 'low' breaks structured output with complex schemas.

memory_save_context_turns.title: Memory Save Context Turns
memory_save_context_turns.description: Number of recent conversation turns to provide to Haiku for analysis

pair_programmer_enabled.title: Pair Programmer Enabled
pair_programmer_enabled.description: Enable PostToolUse sidecar pair programmer that evaluates agent actions against user preferences and past experience.

pair_programmer_sample_rate.title: Pair Programmer Sample Rate
pair_programmer_sample_rate.description: Probability of evaluating each action tool call (0.0-1.0). Lower = cheaper.

pair_programmer_cooldown_s.title: Pair Programmer Cooldown (seconds)
pair_programmer_cooldown_s.description: Minimum seconds between evaluations. Prevents rapid-fire during batch edits.

pair_programmer_context_messages.title: Pair Programmer Context Messages
pair_programmer_context_messages.description: Number of recent conversation messages to include in trajectory.

pair_programmer_context_max_chars.title: Pair Programmer Context Max Chars
pair_programmer_context_max_chars.description: Maximum characters of conversation context for pair programmer.

pair_programmer_effort.title: Pair Programmer Effort
pair_programmer_effort.description: Effort level for pair programmer calls. '' (default) required for reliable structured output.

pair_programmer_max_tool_input_chars.title: Pair Programmer Max Tool Input Chars
pair_programmer_max_tool_input_chars.description: Maximum characters of tool input to include in trajectory.

pair_programmer_max_tool_output_chars.title: Pair Programmer Max Tool Output Chars
pair_programmer_max_tool_output_chars.description: Maximum characters of tool output to include in trajectory.

pair_programmer_max_recall_files.title: Pair Programmer Max Recall Files
pair_programmer_max_recall_files.description: Maximum number of memory files to recall for evaluation context.

pair_programmer_max_memory_file_chars.title: Pair Programmer Max Memory File Chars
pair_programmer_max_memory_file_chars.description: Maximum characters to read from each recalled memory file.

recall_async.title: Recall Async
recall_async.description: Run recall hook (UserPromptSubmit/SubagentStart) asynchronously. Default false (sync) because recall must inject context before agent responds.

memory_save_async.title: Memory Save Async
memory_save_async.description: Run memory save hook (Stop) asynchronously. Default true -- save doesn't need to block.

pair_programmer_async.title: Pair Programmer Async
pair_programmer_async.description: Run pair programmer hook (PostToolUse) asynchronously. Default true -- feedback arrives at next tool call instead of blocking current one.

curator_enabled.title: Memory Curator Enabled
curator_enabled.description: Enable periodic memory consolidation on Stop hook. Merges duplicates, deletes stale entries.

curator_cooldown_h.title: Curator Cooldown (hours)
curator_cooldown_h.description: Minimum hours between curator runs. Default 4.

curator_effort.title: Curator Effort
curator_effort.description: Effort level for curator. '' (default) required for complex merge schemas.

curator_async.title: Curator Async
curator_async.description: Run curator asynchronously. Default true -- consolidation doesn't need to block.
